title: Pretty an Doors
description: My personal modpack with great visuals and Dimensional doors on top of that.
body:
This is my first time making a modpack, Hopefully you enjoy it! It's a very pretty modpack with Dimensional Doors too(thus the name). Very similar to the popular modpack "RLCraft" in terms of graphics. It's a Vanilla+ modpack, but very much not at the same time. Try it for yourself, see how it plays. Keep in mind however, it is forge only. Neoforge for 1.20.1 isn't updated to work Currently. 

Server modpack and Client modpack version are seperate because for some reason forge crashes when loading the 60 client sided mods on a server.
